top_signals.title: Remarks by Commissioner Dombrovskis at the press conference presenting the Spring 2026 Economic Forecast
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Brussels, 21 May 2026 Good morning. Let me begin right away with the five key messages contained in our Spring 2026 Economic Forecast.
First, on the broader context.

top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Indian telecom major Bharti Airtel is doubling down on overseas businesses
top_signals.summary: Indian telecom giant Bharti Airtel is raising its stake in British and African ventures as it hunts for growth overseas
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Assessing the Impact of Energy Bill Support in 2022–23 on Bank Rate and Mortgage Rates
top_signals.summary: This note sets out how HMT assessed the estimated effect of the 2022–23 Energy Bill Support measures on Bank Rate and, in turn, on the cost of a new representative mortgage.

top_signals.title: Indonesia’s Danantara Says to ‘Listen to Market’ on Export Body
top_signals.summary: Indonesia will “listen to the market” as it builds a body to oversee key commodity exports, according to Pandu Sjahrir, chief investment officer of sovereign wealth fund Danantara.
